Az oxidáció gyors hevítéssel, pl. serpenyőben sütéssel vagy gőzöléssel megállítható. A leveleket ezután összetekerik. Eme Basilur tea a következő tömegben vásárolható meg: 100 g. items.raw_desc: Cink GreenFood Nutrition Cink-kelát, 90 kapszula:GreenFood Nutrition Zinc Chelate90 + 20 capsulesZinc bisglycinate is a chelated form of the mineral zinc, where zinc is bound to two molecules of the amino acid glycine. This form of chelate is designed to improve the absorption and bioavailability of zinc in the body. Chelation is the process by which a mineral is bound to an organic molecule, allowing for better transport and utilization of that mineral in the body. By being bound to two glycine molecules, zinc forms a stable chelate complex. This structure protects zinc from interactions with other substances in the digestive tract that could reduce its absorption.  It is a popular choice for zinc supplementation precisely because of its high absorption and gentleness to the stomach. Zinc bisglycinate is most commonly available in dietary supplements in the form of capsules to ensure accurate dosing.
